worldData.instructions:
A CRT running callable channels.
CLICK or SPACE — change the channel: static, plasma, self-playing Pong, a boids murmuration, and a SITCOM.

The last three are real algorithms living in the hook; the tube just calls them. The sitcom cast are four little lives moving through behavior zones — couch, kitchen, window, the door — pairing up to talk. When a punchline lands, the laugh track does too.

stepHooks.author: fable
stepHooks.description: TV: channel input + the algorithms the channels display (self-playing Pong, boids murmuration).

visualTypes.name: tv_set
